title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 42–45, this part focuses on Unknown person #27, Unknown person #28, Unknown person #29, Yamato, Unknown person #30, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep, no issues at all. It's as good as new!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Even got my shipwright stamp of approval.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this thing uses some sort of special paddle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: How do you power it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: WOOSH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: OH! A flame dial?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If your flame starts to die down, the waves will swallow you up for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure you gathered enough power in that thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Ride this ship with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: until we reach the very top!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Shinka Shiranui!! Itto!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: It put out the captain's flames?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the flame dial from the sky islands!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You cannot surpass the pirate King!! You don't need to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: So please... Run away now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Do I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Look like a weaking to you...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Don't worry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: It's more than strong enough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: There isn't a flame on this ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: That burns hotter than this one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: RING RING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Hey Deuce!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: It's about what we discussed earlier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And it'll be on the front page!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'll give you triple for that story!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: "The adven- Tures of fire fist ace"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us be the ones to publish it! Of course, distribution is included!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: There's no doubt, it'll sell like crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet it'll become even more famous than that logbook, "brag men"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: sorry, morgans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: that story...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: ...Is just not meant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for the eyes of the world to see.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Caw! What a waste!! Riches and fame beyond belief are right there for the taking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'm done with this convert- sation now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Let's talk about work.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'm free if you need a hand,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Che!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, your articles are pretty popular too, I guess.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd prefer to report on news about straw hat and the revolutionary army chief of staff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That's a pretty freakin' narrow scope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: You looking down on our paper?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got to see it with my own eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The last Embers he left...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...that carry his dream!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
